nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Santa Marta foliage-gleaner
nodes.summary: Santa Marta foliage-gleaner（Santa Marta foliage-gleaner，学名 Clibanornis rufipectus），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要分布于原始森林、次生林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the undergrowth of semi-humid forest, both primary and secondary, and also occurs in shade coffee plantations

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the undergrowth of semi-humid forest, both primary and secondary, and also occurs in shade coffee plantations

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Despite its tolerance of low levels of habitat conversion, the species is threatened by the loss and fragmentation of its habitat, and it was found to be absent in sun-grown coffee plantations and in small secondary-growth patches surrounded by open areas." and "Deforestation and forest degradation are accelerating and are projected to increase further, as coffee plantations and touristic infrastructure expand across the Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta." About 40% of its range is in protected areas
